scripts.build: npm run verify-router && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.setup-hooks: cp scripts/pre-commit-router-check.sh .git/hooks/pre-commit && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-commit && echo '✅ pre-commit hook 已安装'
scripts.deploy: npm run verify-router && npm run build && npm run deploy:gh
scripts.deploy:gh: git checkout --orphan gh-pages-tmp && git rm -rf . && cp dist/index.html . && cp dist/favicon.svg . && cp -r dist/assets . && touch .nojekyll && git add index.html favicon.svg assets .nojekyll && git commit -m "deploy" && git push origin gh-pages-tmp:gh-pages --force && git checkout main && git branch -D gh-pages-tmp
